blended.narrative: Bridger Bowl is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.8 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,011 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow over the past week. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 27".
